meta.title: 3 things I wish I knew when writing letters to my boyfriend at basic training
meta.description:
Know someone who is at or going to basic training? These are the 3 things I wish I knew before my boyfriend had left for basic training.

📬  Mailing Addresses For Basic Training

Army Basic Training: https://bit.ly/3f8BjMj

Marine Corps Boot Camp: https://bit.ly/3g9jZs0

Navy Boot Camp: https://bit.ly/3jOPvxG

Air Force Basic Training: https://bit.ly/3glwdOt

Coast Guard Boot Camp: https://bit.ly/30c8lXX

✍️  What to write in your letters to basic training:
https://bit.ly/39BxpdZ


#basictrainingletters #bootcampletters #writingletterstobasictraining
